questionHtml: Using the information in the graph, describe how the experiment could be extended to determine the optimum temperature for immobilized HRP.
markschemeHtml:
1. the graph shows the optimum temperature to be near 40 °C;
  2. choose smaller range of temperature (between 30 and 50 °C);
  3. smaller increments of temperature

c. Accept numbers such as 1 or 5 degrees.

meta.title: Using the information in the graph, describe how the experiment could be extended to determine the optimum temperature for immobilized HRP.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
